=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan January-14-1998 Garde Arts Center  New London, Connecticut
Love Sick

cd-r>EAC (secure mode)>TLH (level 8)>maketorrent>HC


cd-1
Absolutely Sweet Marie 
Not Dark Yet 
Cold Irons Bound 
I'll Be Your Baby Tonight 
Can't Wait 
Silvio 
The Times 
Love Minus Zero/No Limit 
Tangled Up In Blue 
Million Miles 
This Wheel's On Fire 
'Til I Fell In Love With You 

cd-2
Like A Rolling Stone 
Don't Think Twice 
Love Sick 
Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 
Bonus: 
Cocaine Blues (1) 
Roving Gambler (1) 
Rank Strangers To Me  (A. Brumley) (2) 
Blind Willie McTell (1) 
Long Black Veil (Dill / Wilkin)(3) 
One Of Us Must Know (4) 
Knockin' On Heaven's Door (5) 
Hard Rain (5) 
Forever Young (5) 

(1) International Centre, Bournemouth, UK 10/01/97 
(2) Wembley Arena, London, UK  October 5, 1997 
(3) Capitol Music Hall, Wheeling, WV April 28, 1997 
(4) Montage Center, Scranton, PA August 12, 1997 
(5) World Eucharist Conf. Bologna, Italy 9/27/97 


more info http://www.bobsboots.com/CDs/cd-l63.html
